   projects = ~w(reach quickbeam volt phoenix_vapor phoenix_replay vue-pencil   
   vize_ex oxc_ex)                                                              
   for dir <- projects do                                                       
     path = "/Users/dannote/Development/#{dir}"                                 
     IO.puts("== #{dir} ==")                                                    
   end                                                                          
                                                                                
   == reach ==
